payload.answer: No durable memory should be created from this weather statement alone. If you want, you can keep it as a temporary note, add it separately as a non-durable observation, or ignore it.
repair_options: Keep as a temporary observation only, without saving to durable memory.
Add it separately as a non-durable note about today’s weather.
